section_miscategorizations.text: There is no elevated white blood cell count.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an objective lab result rather than patient-reported history or symptoms, so it belongs in Findings.

This duplicates the preceding plan to continue lisinopril 10 mg daily and could be misread as a new or separate order; while still a plan item, the redundancy slightly blurs whether this is continuation vs. new initiation.
